member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.IWaypointManager.GetFromGameWaypointComponent(SpaceWarp2.Game.API.IGameWaypointComponent)
member.summary: Make a waypoint from a preexisting one
member.param: A game waypoint component, implemented as an interface here, but this interface is only implemented on one type
member.returns: A waypoint made from the preexisting waypoint

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.WaypointState
member.summary: This contains the state for a waypoint

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.WaypointState.Visible
member.summary: The waypoint is shown in the flight/map view

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.WaypointState.Hidden
member.summary: The waypoint is hidden in the flight/map view

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.SerializedWaypoint
member.summary: This contains the serialized information for a waypoint, used for saving/loading waypoints

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.SerializedWaypoint.BodyName
member.summary: The body the waypoint is on

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.SerializedWaypoint.State
member.summary: The current state of the waypoint

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.SerializedWaypoint.Deserialize
member.summary: Deserializes the waypoint, creating an actual waypoint from it
member.returns: A newly created waypoint from the serialized waypoint's parameters

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.IWaypoint.Destroy
member.exception: Thrown if the waypoint was already destroyed

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.IWaypoint.Move(System.Double,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String)
member.summary: Moves a waypoint to another position
member.param: The new latitude of the waypoint
The new longitude of the waypoint
The altitude of the waypoint, if null it defaults to the height of the terrain at the specified latitude/longitude
The body that the waypoint is around, if null it defaults to the waypoints current body
member.exception: Thrown if the waypoint is destroyed, or if there is no waypoint with the name bodyName

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.IWaypoint.Rename(System.String)
member.param: The new name for the waypoint, if null defaults to Waypoint-{sequential_number}
member.exception: Thrown if the waypoint is destroyed

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Game.API.Waypoints.IWaypoint.Serialize
member.summary: Serializes the waypoint to be saved in save data
member.returns: The waypoint as a serialized record
